name: Boxing
description: Boxing is a one-on-one fighting game where the player controls a boxer in a traditional boxing ring. The objective is to defeat the opponent by knockout (KO) or by accumulating more points than the opponent by the end of the match. The game features two boxers, player controlled and AI controlled, each with their own attributes such as stamina, strength, and speed. Players can utilize jabs, hooks, uppercuts, and blocking maneuvers. A stamina bar depletes with each action, and boxers need to manage their stamina to avoid becoming vulnerable. Successfully landing punches reduces the opponent's health, potentially leading to a knockdown. After a knockdown, the opponent has a limited time to get back on their feet or suffer a KO. If no KO occurs, a scoring system based on punches landed and aggressiveness determines the winner at the end of the match. The game will need to also allow for the player to move around the ring to avoid attacks.
